# Results — BirdSpecies (NIPS4B 2013 Bird Challenge)

Metric: **pooled AUC** (one ROC-AUC over all `file × class` pairs; higher is better). OOF = 5-fold
multilabel-stratified (seed 42). Macro AUC tracked alongside as a secondary diagnostic. Full
per-run log: `BirdSpecies/experiments/README.md`.

| Model | Features | OOF pooled AUC | OOF macro AUC | Public LB | Private LB | Notes |
|-------|----------|---------------:|--------------:|----------:|------------:|-------|
| **Blend (rf_full+rf+cnn)** | mixed | **0.94099** | — | **0.91598** | **0.90821** | Final. Global rank-average. Sub 54284029. |
| RandomForest | full(182) | 0.93732 | **0.9190** | 0.90799 | 0.89786 | Best single model. Sub 54254895. |
| RandomForest | ext(154) | 0.92983 | 0.9111 | 0.89843 | 0.89122 | Δ/percentiles ~flat OOF vs base, but beat it on LB. Sub 54749853. |
| RandomForest | base(86) | 0.92981 | 0.9130 | 0.89424 | 0.88889 | Baseline. Sub 54251123. |
| CNN (effnet_b0) | log-mel | 0.90990 | 0.8953 | — | — | Weaker solo but decorrelates errors — blend diversity member only. |
| LogReg | base(86) | 0.89515 | 0.8778 | — | — | Not submitted. |
| LogReg | full(182) | 0.89243 | 0.8814 | — | — | Not submitted. |
| LogReg | ext(154) | 0.88503 | 0.8742 | — | — | Not submitted; weakest LogReg variant. |
| LightGBM | base(86) | 0.88545 | 0.8781 | — | — | Overfits with few positives/class — not submitted. |

**Submitted (4):** RF base(86) → sub 54251123, RF full(182) → sub 54254895, RF ext(154) → sub
54749853, Blend rf_full+rf+cnn → sub 54284029 — confirmed via Kaggle submissions list and
commits `7a26da359`, `26754cb85`, `1c15a317c`.

**Not submitted (5):** LogReg base(86), LogReg full(182), LogReg ext(154), LightGBM base(86),
CNN (effnet_b0) — no LB numbers in metrics.json, README, or git log for these; CNN was
intentionally kept solo-unsubmitted (used only inside the blend).
